formInstance.inputDocument:
Dear [Professional Association Name],

I am writing to formally apply for membership in [Professional Association Name] as a Student Member for a duration of one year. My name is Chloe Harris, and I am a student intern at Art School with a background in Graphic Design.

I hold a Bachelor's Degree in Graphic Design and have a keen interest in expanding my knowledge and network within the industry. Despite having no professional certifications yet, I am eager to learn and grow as a budding professional in the field.

With zero years of experience in the industry, I am looking forward to opportunities that will help me develop my skills and knowledge further. As a student intern at Art School, I am passionate about honing my craft and contributing positively to the field of Graphic Design.

I am reaching out to you with a reference from Professor Karen Adams, who is my instructor at Art School. Professor Adams can attest to my dedication, enthusiasm, and commitment to learning and growing in the field of Graphic Design.

I believe that membership in [Professional Association Name] will provide me with valuable resources, networking opportunities, and professional development tools that will complement my ongoing education and training. I am excited about the prospect of connecting with fellow professionals and industry leaders to learn from their experiences and insights.

I am confident that my background in Graphic Design and my current role as a student intern make me a suitable candidate for membership in your esteemed association. I am committed to upholding the values and standards of [Professional Association Name] and contributing positively to its community.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to become a part of [Professional Association Name] and to contribute to the vibrant community of professionals in the field of Graphic Design.

Yours sincerely,

Chloe Harris
chloe.harris@yahoo.com
555-6784
May 15, 1995.
